translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Peter, apostle of Jesus Christ, to [the] sojourners of [the] dispersion of Pontus, Galatia, Cappadocia, Asia, and Bithynia,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: elect according to [the] foreknowledge ofGod [the] Father, by sanctification of [the] Spirit, unto [the] obedience and sprinkling of [the] blood of Jesus Christ: Grace to you and peace be multiplied.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Blessed [be] theGod and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, who, according to his great mercy, has begotten us again to a living hope through [the] resurrection of Jesus Christ from among [the] dead,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: to an incorruptible and undefiled and unfading inheritance, reserved in [the] heavens for you,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: who are kept guarded by [the] power ofGod through faith for salvation ready to be revealed in [the] last time.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Wherein ye exult, for a little while at present, if needed, put to grief by various trials,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: that the proving of your faith, much more precious than of gold which perishes, though it be proved by fire, be found to praise and glory and honour in [the] revelation of Jesus Christ:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: whom, having not seen, ye love; on whom [though] not now looking, but believing, ye exult with joy unspeakable and filled with [the] glory,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: receiving the end of your faith, [the] salvation of [your] souls.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Concerning which salvation prophets, who have prophesied of the grace towards you, sought out and searched out;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: searching what, or what manner of time, the Spirit of Christ which [was] in them pointed out, testifying before of the sufferings which [belonged] to Christ, and the glories after these.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: To whom it was revealed, that not to themselves but to you they ministered those things, which have now been announced to you by those who have declared to you the glad tidings by [the] Holy Spirit, sent from heaven, which angels desire to look into.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Wherefore, having girded up the loins of your mind, [be] sober [and] hope with perfect stedfastness in the grace [which will be] brought to you at [the] revelation of Jesus Christ;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: as children of obedience, not conformed to [your] former lusts in your ignorance;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: but as he who has called you is holy, be ye also holy in all [your] conversation;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: because it is written, Be ye holy, for I am holy.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And if ye invoke as Father him who, without regard of persons, judges according to the work of each, pass your time of sojourn in fear,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: knowing that ye have been redeemed, not by corruptible [things, as] silver or gold, from your vain conversation handed down from [your] fathers,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: but by precious blood, as of a lamb without blemish and without spot, [the blood] of Christ,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: foreknown indeed before [the] foundation of [the] world, but who has been manifested at the end of times for your sakes,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: who by him do believe onGod, who has raised him from among [the] dead and given him glory, that your faith and hope should be inGod.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Having purified your souls by obedience to the truth to unfeigned brotherly love, love one another out of a pure heart fervently;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: being born again, not of corruptible seed, but of incorruptible, by [the] living and abiding word ofGod.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Because all flesh [is] as grass, and all its glory as [the] flower of grass. The grass has withered and [its] flower has fallen;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: but the word of [the] Lord abides for eternity. But this is the word which in the glad tidings [is] preached to you.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Laying aside therefore all malice and all guile and hypocrisies and envyings and all evil speakings,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: as newborn babes desire earnestly the pure mental milk of the word, that by it ye may grow up to salvation,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: if indeed ye have tasted that the Lord [is] good.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: To whom coming, a living stone, cast away indeed as worthless by men, but withGod chosen, precious,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: yourselves also, as living stones, are being built up a spiritual house, a holy priesthood, to offer spiritual sacrifices acceptable toGod by Jesus Christ.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Because it is contained in the scripture: Behold, I lay in Zion a corner stone, elect, precious: and he that believes on him shall not be put to shame.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: To you therefore who believe [is] the preciousness; but to the disobedient, the stone which the builders cast away as worthless, this is become head of [the] corner,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and a stone of stumbling and rock of offence; [who] stumble at the word, being disobedient to which also they have been appointed.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But ye [are] a chosen race, a kingly priesthood, a holy nation, a people for a possession, that ye might set forth the excellencies of him who has called you out of darkness to his wonderful light;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: who once [were] not a people, but nowGod's people; who were not enjoying mercy, but now have found mercy.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Beloved, I exhort [you], as strangers and sojourners, to abstain from fleshly lusts, which war against the soul;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: having your conversation honest among the Gentiles, that [as to that] in which they speak against you as evildoers, they may through [your] good works, [themselves] witnessing [them], glorifyGod in [the] day of visitation.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Be in subjection [therefore] to every human institution for the Lord's sake; whether to [the] king as supreme,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: or to rulers as sent by him, for vengeance on evildoers, and praise to them that do well.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Because so is the will ofGod, that by well-doing ye put to silence the ignorance of senseless men;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: as free, and not as having liberty as a cloak of malice, but asGod's bondmen.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Shew honour to all, love the brotherhood, fearGod, honour the king.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Servants, [be] subject with all fear to your masters, not only to the good and gentle, but also to the ill-tempered.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For this [is] acceptable, if one, for conscience sake towardsGod, endure griefs, suffering unjustly.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For what glory [is it], if sinning and being buffeted ye shall bear [it]? but if, doing good and suffering, ye shall bear [it], this is acceptable withGod.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For to this have ye been called; for Christ also has suffered for you, leaving you a model that ye should follow in his steps:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: who did no sin, neither was guile found in his mouth;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: who, [when] reviled, reviled not again; [when] suffering, threatened not; but gave [himself] over into the hands of him who judges righteously;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: who himself bore our sins in his body on the tree, in order that, being dead to sins, we may live to righteousness: by whose stripes ye have been healed.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For ye were going astray as sheep, but have now returned to the shepherd and overseer of your souls.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Likewise, wives, [be] subject to your own husbands, that, even if any are disobedient to the word, they may be gained without [the] word by the conversation of the wives,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: having witnessed your pure conversation [carried out] in fear;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: whose adorning let it not be that outward one of tressing of hair, and wearing gold, or putting on apparel;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: but the hidden man of the heart, in the incorruptible [ornament] of a meek and quiet spirit, which in the sight ofGod is of great price.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For thus also the holy women who have hoped inGod heretofore adorned themselves, being subject to their own husbands;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: as Sarah obeyed Abraham, calling him lord; whose children ye have become, doing good, and not fearing with any kind of consternation.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: [Ye] husbands likewise, dwell with [them] according to knowledge, as with a weaker, [even] the female, vessel, giving [them] honour, as also fellow-heirs of [the] grace of life, that your prayers be not hindered.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Finally, [be] all of one mind, sympathising, full of brotherly love, tender hearted, humble minded;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: not rendering evil for evil, or railing for railing; but on the contrary, blessing [others], because ye have been called to this, that ye should inherit blessing.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For he that will love life and see good days, let him cause his tongue to cease from evil and his lips that they speak no guile.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And let him avoid evil, and do good; let him seek peace and pursue it;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: because [the] eyes of [the] Lord [are] on [the] righteous, and his ears towards their supplications; but [the] face of [the] Lord [is] against them that do evil.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And who shall injure you if ye have become imitators of that which [is] good?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But if also ye should suffer for righteousness' sake, blessed [are ye]; but be not afraid of their fear, neither be troubled;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: but sanctify [the] Lord the Christ in your hearts, and [be] always prepared to [give] an answer [to] every one that asks you to give an account of the hope that [is] in you, but with meekness and fear;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: having a good conscience, that [as to that] in which they speak against you as evildoers, they may be ashamed who calumniate your good conversation in Christ.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For [it is] better, if the will ofGod should will it, to suffer [as] well-doers than [as] evildoers;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: for Christ indeed has once suffered for sins, [the] just for [the] unjust, that he might bring us toGod; being put to death in flesh, but made alive in [the] Spirit,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: in which also going he preached to the spirits [which are] in prison,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: heretofore disobedient, when the longsuffering ofGod waited in [the] days of Noah while the ark was preparing, into which few, that is, eight souls, were saved through water:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: which figure also now saves you, [even] baptism, not a putting away of [the] filth of flesh, but [the] demand as beforeGod of a good conscience, by [the] resurrection of Jesus Christ,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: who is at [the] right hand ofGod, gone into heaven, angels and authorities and powers being subjected to him.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Christ, then, having suffered for us in [the] flesh, do ye also arm yourselves with the same mind; for he that has suffered in [the] flesh has done with sin,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: no longer to live the rest of [his] time in [the] flesh to men's lusts, but toGod's will.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For the time past [is] sufficient [for us] to have wrought the will of the Gentiles, walking in lasciviousness, lusts, wine-drinking, revels, drinkings, and unhallowed idolatries.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Wherein they think it strange that ye run not with [them] to the same sink of corruption, speaking injuriously [of you];

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: who shall render account to him who is ready to judge [the] living and [the] dead.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For to this [end] were the glad tidings preached to [the] dead also, that they might be judged, as regards men, after [the] flesh, but live, as regardsGod, after [the] Spirit.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But the end of all things is drawn nigh: be sober therefore, and be watchful unto prayers;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: but before all things having fervent love among yourselves, because love covers a multitude of sins;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: hospitable one to another, without murmuring;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: each according as he has received a gift, ministering it to one another, as good stewards of [the] various grace ofGod.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: If any one speak — as oracles ofGod; if any one minister — as of strength whichGod supplies; thatGod in all things may be glorified through Jesus Christ, to whom is the glory and the might for the ages of ages. Amen.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Beloved, take not [as] strange the fire [of persecution] which has taken place amongst you for [your] trial, as if a strange thing was happening to you;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: but as ye have share in the sufferings of Christ, rejoice, that in the revelation of his glory also ye may rejoice with exultation.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: If ye are reproached in [the] name of Christ, blessed [are ye]; for the [Spirit] of glory and the Spirit ofGod rests upon you: [on their part he is blasphemed, but on your part he is glorified.]

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let none of you suffer indeed as murderer, or thief, or evildoer, or as overseer of other people's matters;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: but if as a christian, let him not be ashamed, but glorifyGod in this name.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For the time of having the judgment begin from the house ofGod [is come]; but if first from us, what [shall be] the end of those who obey not the glad tidings ofGod?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And if the righteous is difficultly saved, where shall the impious and [the] sinner appear?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Wherefore also let them who suffer according to the will ofGod commit their souls in well-doing to a faithful Creator.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The elders which [are] among you I exhort, who [am their] fellow-elder and witness of the sufferings of the Christ, who also [am] partaker of the glory about to be revealed:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: shepherd the flock ofGod which [is] among you, exercising oversight, not by necessity, but willingly; not for base gain, but readily;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: not as lording it over your possessions, but being models for the flock.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And when the chief shepherd is manifested ye shall receive the unfading crown of glory.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Likewise [ye] younger, be subject to [the] elder, and all of you bind on humility towards one another; forGod sets himself against [the] proud, but to [the] humble gives grace.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Humble yourselves therefore under the mighty hand ofGod, that he may exalt you in [the due] time;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: having cast all your care upon him, for he cares about you.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Be vigilant, watch. Your adversary [the] devil as a roaring lion walks about seeking whom he may devour.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Whom resist, stedfast in faith, knowing that the selfsame sufferings are accomplished in your brotherhood which [is] in [the] world.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But theGod of all grace who has called you to his eternal glory in Christ Jesus, when ye have suffered for a little while, himself shall make perfect, stablish, strengthen, ground:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: to him [be] the glory and the might for the ages of the ages. Amen.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: By Silvanus, the faithful brother, as I suppose, I have written to you briefly; exhorting and testifying that this is [the] true grace ofGod in which ye stand.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: She that is elected with [you] in Babylon salutes you, and Marcus my son.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Salute one another with a kiss of love. Peace be with you all who [are] in Christ.
